zh.lifeSummary: 當Bleddyn ap Tudur於大約1095年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾時，他的父親Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington42歲，母親Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan32歲。他和Annes or Agnes ferch Llywelyn至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1195年在英國威爾斯享年102歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Tudur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tudor
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

nameMeanings.name: Bleddyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from an ancient byname from blaidd ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -yn. Blaidd was often used in medieval Welsh as a term for a hero.

en.lifeSummary: When Bleddyn ap Tudur was born about 1095, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington, was 42 and his mother, Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan, was 32. He had at least 2 sons with Annes or Agnes ferch Llywelyn. He died about 1195, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 102, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bleddyn ap Tudur est né environ 1095, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Annes or Agnes ferch Llywelyn. Il est décédé environ 1195, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 102 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Annes or Agnes ferch Llywelyn mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1195 im Alter von 102 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Tudurが約1095年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittingtonは42歳，母Sioned ferch Rhys Vychanは32歳であった。彼はAnnes or Agnes ferch Llywelynとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1195年にイギリスウェールズで102歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bleddyn ap Tudur(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Annes or Agnes ferch Llywelyn(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1195년 영국 웨일스에서 102세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bleddyn ap Tudur родился около 1095 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Annes or Agnes ferch Llywelyn. Он умер около 1195 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 102 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.
